news-korea-econ.title: Navy veteran Rocky Rochford seeks to turn Tampa Bay red, unseat 20-year House incumbent
news-korea-econ.description: Retired Commodore Rocky Rochford pledges to be ready to lead on day one, with legislation ready to introduce into Congress.

news-global-econ.title: Trump holds 'all the cards' after high-stakes summit with China, says Victor Davis Hanson
news-global-econ.description: Victor Davis Hanson says Trump holds all the cards in China negotiations, citing U.S. energy dominance, AI growth and China's declining birth rate.

news-global-econ.title: State championship high school baseball game ends in chaos as player does something rare, but beautiful
news-global-econ.description: South Walton High School executed a suicide squeeze with the bases loaded in a tie game to win the Florida state baseball championship in Fort Myers.

news-global-econ.title: Inside the teen takeovers threatening to explode this summer as cities remain on edge: 'Very worried'
news-global-econ.description: Cities nationwide brace for a summer surge in teen takeovers as experts warn social media is fueling violence, prompting curfews and mass arrests.

news-global-econ.title: Diners ditching bottles of wine for the table as healthy living and rising costs reshape restaurant habits
news-global-econ.description: A new report says fewer diners are ordering bottles of wine for the table, prompting restaurants to boost revenue through premium mocktails and pricing.

news-global-econ.title: Chinese espionage steals $600 billion from US firms yearly. It’s time for government to act
news-global-econ.description: I spoke with former CIA colleague Tom Lyons about how China's systematic espionage threatens U.S. companies and what reforms could harden defenses.

news-korea-soc.title: Pope Creates Artificial Intelligence Study Group in Preparation For First Encyclical
news-korea-soc.description: Pope Leo XIV has created a study group on artificial intelligence, the Vatican said Saturday, as he gears up to release his first encyclical that is expected to emphasize the need for an ethics-based approach to the technology that prioritizes human dignity a…

news-global-soc.title: Trump: U.S. and Nigerian Forces Take Out Top ISIS Terrorist in Africa
news-global-soc.description:
The second in command of ISIS globally, Abu-Bilal al-Minuki, was killed by U.S. and Nigerian forces targeting the top terrorist in the northeast region of the African country, President Donald Trump announced.

news-global-soc.title: Think Tank: Warner-Paramount Merger Could Add 40,000 Jobs and Boost Struggling Movie Theaters
news-global-soc.description:
A proposed $110 billion merger of Paramount Global and Warner Bros. Discovery could result in 40,000 jobs and provide a massive "boost to the industry."

news-global-soc.title: Exiled Muslim scholar warns far-left–Islamist alliance behind anti-Israel protests echoes Iran’s rise
news-global-soc.description: Muslim scholar who fled Egypt warns America's far-left alliance with Islamist extremism could repeat Iran's 1979 revolution pattern in the U.S. today.

news-global-soc.title: Putin to Visit Chinese Leader Xi Jinping Days After Trump's Trip to Beijing
news-global-soc.description:
Russian President Vladimir Putin will meet with Chinese leader Xi Jinping on a two-day trip to Beijing next week, the Kremlin said Saturday.
The post Putin to Visit Chinese Leader Xi Jinping Days After Trump’s Trip to Beijing appeared first on Breitbart.
